overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character navigates wet reflective sidewalks beneath building overhangs, crosses a busy intersection with yellow crosswalk markings, and continues along a commercial street lined with large digital billboards and industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath neon-lit building facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk beneath building overhang with pink neon lighting

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall building facade with vertical pink neon light strips and reflective dark surfaces
overhead building structure providing partial cover over the sidewalk
wet asphalt street with moving vehicle traffic and street lamps

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath a building overhang, with a pink neon-lit building facade dominating the right side. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions while vehicles move along the street to the left. The environment is sheltered with neon lighting reflecting off the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: character approaches crosswalk and waits with group of pedestrians for traffic signal
character steps onto yellow crosswalk and begins crossing the wet street

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection, waiting at crosswalk, then crossing the street with a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection as pedestrians wait
group of pedestrians waiting at crosswalk then crossing together with ego

entered.detail: broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing marked with X symbols and WAIT text
open urban intersection with tall buildings and digital billboards visible in distance
tall traffic signal posts with illuminated lights controlling vehicle flow

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with a yellow zebra crosswalk. The character waits with a moderate crowd of pedestrians for the traffic signal, then crosses the wet asphalt street as vehicles pass by. The environment transitions from sheltered to fully exposed with neon lighting from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large curved digital billboards and industrial piping

events.description: character completes crossing and enters street section with large digital billboard wall on right

agents.ego_description: walking along open sidewalk following a pedestrian ahead, passing large digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark coat walking ahead of ego along the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive curved digital screens displaying advertisements with bright neon colors
large industrial piping running along the lower section of the billboard wall
metal railing separating sidewalk from the street with vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open commercial sidewalk lined with massive curved digital billboards on the right displaying bright neon advertisements. Industrial piping runs along the wall beneath the screens. The street is less crowded with sparse pedestrians walking ahead, and the wet pavement reflects the colorful neon lights from the surrounding cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from a sheltered walkway into a wide, exposed urban intersection and finally along a commercial corridor. It begins with the character walking along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath a building overhang, where a pink neon facade casts reflections across the pavement. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a broad intersection with a yellow zebra crosswalk, shifting from the sheltered overhang to a fully exposed street filled with passing vehicles and a crowd of pedestrians. The camera then follows the character across the wet asphalt and onto an open commercial sidewalk, where the environment expands to reveal massive curved digital billboards and industrial piping. Finally, the shot continues past sparse pedestrians as the colorful neon advertisements from the surrounding cityscape saturate the reflective ground.
